thumb.text: Sensors detect a hitchhiker signal — someone out there is broadcasting the universal symbol: a thumb, extended with hope. Do we acknowledge it?

hiker-guide.text: The signal responds with gratitude and a data packet: a well-worn copy of the Guide's entry on this region. Summary: 'Mostly harmless. Good fries at exit {n:12-99}.'

hiker-story.text: The signal shares a story in return: they've been traveling for {n:4-400} years and the best advice they have is 'always know where your towel is.' We checked. Ours is secure.

pass.text: Signal unanswered. It fades with dignity. Somewhere out there, a thumb keeps hoping.
